message:
fix(tutorial): correct navigation logic when no steps completed

The highestCompleted calculation incorrectly used Math.max(0, ...completedSteps, -1)
which returns 0 when completedSteps is empty. This allowed clicking step 1 even
when no steps were completed.

Fixed to use completedSteps.length > 0 ? Math.max(...completedSteps) : -1 which
correctly returns -1 when no steps are completed, restricting navigation to only
the current step until progress is made.
